# wshobson/agents: Production-ready Claude Code subagent collection

## Core Argument
*(What is the single biggest claim this article is making?)*

A curated, production-tested collection of Claude Code subagents covering common engineering workflows — code review, test generation, language-specific personas, commit-message generation, and more — designed to be lifted into operator-owned plugin marketplaces.

## Why I Saved This
*(Why does this matter to me right now?)*

LUNA-3 calibration corpus contains 79 github clips; this is a representative collection-repo (≥5 sub-artifacts in the README). Worked example in plan §14 (clipper-pipeline-plan-2026-05-26.md).
